title: How Garmin's Acquisition of TrainingPeaks Might Affect Your Fitness Routine
summary: This morning, Garmin announced it has acquired TrainingPeaks and TrainHeroic. Maybe TrainingPeaks' best training tools make it into Connect+, Garmin's strength training gets a long-overdue upgrade, and everybody wins.
